content:
Please only attempt the quiz after completing the weekly readings, lectures, and assignments. TWO attempts are provided for the quiz, questions are randomized in each attempt, and the highest score will be awarded in the grade book. The exam is timed, you are allowed 2 minutes per question.

Time for Completion
You have 40 minutes for each attempt of the quiz.

Click Next to read the Week 5 Summary.

Quiz Type
Graded Quiz
Points
100
Assignment Group
Quizzes

No

40 Minutes

Yes
Score to Keep
Highest
Attempts
5

Show Correct Answers
No

Yes
Lock Questions After Answering
No

Week 5 | Summary

Summary
This week, we learned about the importance of credibility in writing and how it affects the strength of our arguments. Just like seeking advice from professionals in their respective fields, we must use credible sources to support our claims. To enhance the credibility of our writing, we avoid using first-person speech and personal opinions based on experience. Instead, we adopt a third-person perspective to present a more authoritative and objective stance.
